caption: A screen recording displays a web browser open to a page titled "Rural Community Food System." The page features a detailed diagram of a circular network with various nodes and connecting lines on the right side, while the left side contains text. The legible text includes a section titled "References" with links for "Large Corporate Farm Systems," "Community Size and Mass of Farm Production," "Rural Community Food Systems," and "SystemsWiki Content." Below this, a sentence reads, "Follow us on Facebook, LinkedIn, or YouTube. My current work in progress happens at SystemsWiki.org." In the top right corner of the browser window, a small webcam overlay shows a man with dark hair and a beard wearing a dark shirt. As the sequence progresses, the browser window remains static, but the man in the webcam overlay shifts his head and facial expression slightly.
